# CAT-G-010 - Callaghan Innovation transition

| Field | Value |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Status** | Organisation **disestablishing through 2026** |
| **URL** | https://www.callaghaninnovation.govt.nz/about-us/disestablishment-updates/ |
| **Fit score** | **40** - transitional awareness only |

## Guidance

- Prefer **MBIE Innovation Services** portals for R&D grants 
- NZIAT absorbs advanced tech commercialisation focus (AI, quantum, synthetic bio) 
- Do not design long-term processes that depend on Callaghan-only systems 

Verify any still-listed Callaghan service is accepting applications before relying on it.
